title: Homelab Orchestration Platform
description: A self-hosted Kubernetes cluster managing 12 services across 3 nodes — Grafana, Gitea, Vaultwarden, and more. Automated with Ansible and Flux CD.

title: Network Segmentation Dashboard
description: VLAN-aware network monitoring UI built on top of pfSense and ntopng. Real-time traffic heatmaps and per-host anomaly detection.

title: Obsidian Productivity System
description: A public vault template combining Zettelkasten, GTD, and deep-work time-blocking. Used by 400+ people on GitHub.

title: shadcn Design System Preset
description: A zero-radius, dark-first shadcn preset with Raleway typography and OKLCH color tokens. Drop-in for any Astro or Next.js project.

title: Self-Hosted Auth Gateway
description: Authelia-powered SSO sitting in front of 20+ internal services. Supports TOTP, WebAuthn, and per-app access rules via LDAP.
